violations.text: No allergen statement on menus. English Food Allergies What You Need to Know New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2026

Per PIC, establishment is Reduced Oxygen Packaging an assortment of foods such as jerky, raw beef, seafood sausage, apples, pears, and tea without approval from RIDOH. Establishment must submit ROP plan to RIDOH. No ROP foods are to be sold without approval. Only ROP tea was on site at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2026

The garage door to the outside, located in the dumpster room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2026
Oranges were not washed before being cut. Plant foods must be thoroughly washed in water to remove soil and other contaminants before they are cut. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2026

Deli containers are being used as scoops in containers of dry ingredients. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine, prep unit, and mixer have an accumulation of dust, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2026
The door to the toilet room near the kitchen is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2026

The dumpster garage floor has an accumulation of debris in a section near the garage door. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2026

The floors around the mop sink are constructed of wood which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2026

One wall at the mop sink is constructed of drywall. One other wall at the mop sink is constructed of unpainted cement board. These materials are not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2026

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025
Inspector observed a 3 bay apparatus within a 1 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2025

The food prep sink is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025
